creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
Is there any reason not to use bzip2'd distfile?
Smaller seems to be smarter in this case.

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/graphics/enfle/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.7
diff -u -r1.7 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/11/14 01:46:09	1.7
+++ Makefile	1999/12/08 19:09:37
@@ -1,15 +1,16 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	enfle
-# Version required:	19991102
+# Version required:	19991206
 # Date created:		Tue Sep 28 02:25:17 JST 1999
 # Whom:			Yuuki SAWADA <mami@whale.cc.muroran-it.ac.jp>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/graphics/enfle/Makefile,v 1.7 1999/11/14 01:46:09 steve Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	enfle-19991102
+DISTNAME=	enfle-19991206
 CATEGORIES=	graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	http://enfle.fennel.org/ \
-		ftp://ftp.goldmoon.org:1200/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/
+		ftp://ftp.goldmoon.org:1200/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/
+USE_BZIP2=	yes
 
 MAINTAINER=	mami@whale.cc.muroran-it.ac.jp

-MD5 (enfle-19991102.tar.gz) = 8d46da846331573e38d5bd93e8ab6ece
